mapper.select:
SELECT r.referral_id AS id, u.real_name AS studentName, si.student_number AS studentId, o.org_name AS collegeName, su.real_name AS sourceCounselorName, tu.real_name AS targetCounselorName, r.target_department AS targetDepartment, r.referral_urgency AS urgency, r.referral_status AS status, CASE r.referral_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'ACCEPTED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已完成' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM referral_record r JOIN student_info si ON r.student_id = si.student_id JOIN user u ON si.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN organization o ON si.college_id = o.org_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info sc ON r.source_counselor_id = sc.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user su ON sc.counselor_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info tc ON r.target_counselor_id = tc.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user tu ON tc.counselor_id = tu.user_id
AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR si.student_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND r.referral_status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE referral_record SET referral_status = 'ACCEPTED', target_counselor_id = #{param4}, target_response = #{param3}, response_date = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE referral_id = #{param1}
UPDATE referral_record SET referral_status = 'REJECTED', target_response = #{param3}, response_date = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE referral_id = #{param1}
